meaning: vt.濂楀嵃,娣诲嵃n.濂楀嵃,鍗版埑
examples: A poorly crystalline kaolinite is included as many of these samples are oxidized and show the kaolinite overprint.
In order to get the precise overprint error, a new detection algorithm based on mathematical morphology was proposed.
In order to get the precise Overprint error, a new Algorithm of the detection based on mathematical morphology is proposed.
